summary: Decent recording of a solid but unremarkable Grateful Dead show.
review: The performance is described as good overall, though reviewers note it doesn't particularly stand out among other concerts. No specific comments about the audio source or sound quality are provided, so the recording is assumed to be serviceable for listening.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) mentions a good but unexceptional show; no information on recording quality, leading to a modest rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer calls the show "good" but notes it does not stand out, implying a solid yet unremarkable set flow.
